_comment: EXAMPLES of regulatory updates - they show the shape of a rule (family, summary, deadline, scope) so you recognise one when you pull CURRENT requirements from live sources (see SOURCES.md). Illustrative only - not the task and not a dataset to match against.

updates.title: RoHS heavy-metal limits review (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr VI)
updates.summary: The Commission has reopened the Annex II review for the four restricted heavy metals. Several lighting and legacy-electronics exemptions for lead and mercury are set to lapse, meaning equipment containing these metals above 0.1% (0.01% for cadmium) must be reformulated or pulled from the EU market.
updates.action_required: Confirm homogeneous-material content of Pb/Hg/Cd/Cr VI; re-test affected SKUs.

scope.conditions: Applies to EEE placed on the EU market containing the listed heavy metals above threshold.

updates.title: RoHS to restrict medium-chain chlorinated paraffins (MCCP)
updates.summary: MCCPs used as plasticisers/flame retardants in cabling and insulation are proposed for addition to the RoHS restricted list.
updates.action_required: Screen cable insulation and plasticised parts for MCCP.

scope.conditions: Applies to EEE containing MCCP above the restriction threshold.

updates.title: RoHS lead exemption renewed for certain medical sensors
updates.summary: Exemption permitting lead in solder of specific in-vivo and body-worn medical sensors is renewed for a further term. Affected manufacturers should re-document the exemption in their technical file.
updates.action_required: Update technical documentation to cite the renewed exemption.

scope.conditions: Applies to medical EEE relying on the lead-in-solder exemption.

updates.title: REACH SVHC list adds bisphenol A; reaffirms DEHP
updates.summary: Bisphenol A (BPA) is added to the Candidate List of Substances of Very High Concern and DEHP is reaffirmed. Articles containing either above 0.1% w/w trigger SCIP notification and supply-chain communication duties.
updates.action_required: Run SVHC screening; file SCIP notifications for affected articles.

scope.conditions: Applies to any article containing BPA or DEHP > 0.1% w/w on the EU market.

updates.title: REACH SVHC list adds 1,4-dioxane
updates.summary: 1,4-Dioxane is added to the SVHC Candidate List. Producers of articles containing it above 0.1% w/w must notify and inform recipients.
updates.action_required: Confirm absence/presence of 1,4-dioxane in articles.

scope.conditions: Applies to articles containing 1,4-dioxane > 0.1% w/w (none expected in this portfolio).

updates.title: REACH restriction on PFHxA in textiles and coatings
updates.summary: A restriction on PFHxA and related substances targets water-repellent coatings on wearable straps and outdoor electronics housings.
updates.action_required: Identify PFAS/PFHxA coatings on straps and housings; source alternatives.

scope.conditions: Applies to wearables and drones with PFHxA-based coatings.

updates.title: REACH SVHC list adds TBBPA (flame retardant)
updates.summary: Tetrabromobisphenol A, common on printed circuit boards, is added to the SVHC Candidate List.
updates.action_required: Screen PCBs for TBBPA; prepare SCIP notifications.

scope.conditions: Applies to networking/IoT equipment with TBBPA-containing boards.

updates.title: WEEE crossed-out wheelie-bin marking & producer registration update
updates.summary: Updated marking and producer-registration obligations apply to all electrical and electronic equipment placed on the EU market.
updates.action_required: Verify WEEE marking and national producer registrations.

scope.conditions: Applies to all EEE on the EU market.

updates.title: Germany EEE producer registration deadline (ElektroG)
updates.summary: Producers selling electrical and electronic equipment into the German market must complete or renew their stiftung ear registration before the deadline. Selling without it is prohibited in Germany.
updates.action_required: Confirm German EAR registration for all EEE sold in DE.

scope.conditions: Applies to EEE sold in Germany (DE) only.

updates.title: Battery passport required for LMT and industrial (>2 kWh) batteries
updates.summary: From the application date, a digital battery passport is mandatory for light-means-of-transport (LMT) batteries and industrial batteries above 2 kWh, as well as EV batteries. Portable consumer batteries are out of scope of the passport requirement.
updates.action_required: Stand up a battery passport (QR + data carrier) for in-scope batteries.

scope.conditions: Applies to LMT batteries and industrial batteries; NOT to portable consumer batteries.

updates.title: Carbon footprint declaration for industrial and EV batteries
updates.summary: Industrial (>2 kWh) and EV batteries must carry a carbon footprint declaration and performance class. LMT batteries follow at a later date.
updates.action_required: Compile life-cycle carbon footprint for industrial battery SKUs.

scope.conditions: Applies to industrial and EV batteries (LMT later).

updates.title: Portable batteries must be user-removable and replaceable
updates.summary: Devices powered by portable or button-cell batteries must be designed so that end users can readily remove and replace the battery.
updates.action_required: Redesign enclosures for user-replaceable cells; update manuals.

scope.conditions: Applies to consumer devices with portable or button-cell batteries.

updates.title: Minimum recycled content for industrial batteries
updates.summary: Industrial and EV batteries must document minimum recycled cobalt, lithium and nickel content.
updates.action_required: Collect recycled-content data from cell suppliers.

scope.conditions: Applies to industrial and EV batteries.

updates.title: USB-C common charger mandate for portable electronics
updates.summary: Portable consumer electronics that recharge via a wired cable must use a USB-C receptacle. Devices still shipping with micro-USB or proprietary connectors must transition. The obligation applies at the point of placing on the EU market.
updates.action_required: Switch wired-charge ports to USB-C across in-scope SKUs.

scope.conditions: Applies to portable electronics with a wired charging port (USB-C/micro-USB/proprietary).

updates.title: RED cybersecurity requirements for internet-connected radio equipment
updates.summary: Radio equipment that connects to the internet must meet network-protection, personal-data and fraud-prevention requirements. Conformity via harmonised standard EN 18031.
updates.action_required: Assess against EN 18031; update risk assessment and firmware.

scope.conditions: Applies to radio equipment that is internet-connected.

updates.title: Updated harmonised standards for short-range devices
updates.summary: New harmonised standards are cited for short-range radio devices; presumption of conformity under the previous versions ends after a transition period.
updates.action_required: Re-assess radio test reports against the new standard versions.

scope.conditions: Applies to radio equipment.

updates.title: PPWR: recycled content and reduction targets for plastic packaging
updates.summary: Plastic packaging must meet minimum recycled-content thresholds and packaging minimisation rules. Plastic film wraps are a specific focus.
updates.action_required: Audit packaging; switch to compliant recycled or reduced formats.

scope.conditions: Applies to products placed on the EU market using plastic-film packaging.

updates.title: PPWR: harmonised packaging material labelling
updates.summary: All packaging must carry harmonised material-composition and sorting labels.
updates.action_required: Add harmonised sorting labels to all packaging.

scope.conditions: Applies to all packaging on the EU market.

updates.title: GPSR: traceability and economic-operator obligations for consumer products
updates.summary: Consumer products need an EU-based responsible economic operator, traceability information and safety documentation. Medical devices and purely industrial equipment follow their own regimes.
updates.action_required: Confirm responsible person, traceability labelling and risk file.

scope.conditions: Applies to consumer products (excludes medical and industrial-only equipment).

updates.title: GPSR: child-safety requirements for products with button/coin cells
updates.summary: Products containing button or coin cell batteries must secure the battery compartment against child access and carry specific warnings.
updates.action_required: Add secured compartments and warnings on button-cell products.

scope.conditions: Applies to any consumer product with a button/coin cell.

updates.title: ESPR Digital Product Passport pilot for chargers, displays, batteries and networking
updates.summary: A Digital Product Passport pilot covers external power supplies, displays, standalone batteries and networking equipment, requiring a machine-readable data carrier with material and repair information.
updates.action_required: Prepare DPP data model and QR data carrier for in-scope categories.

scope.conditions: Applies to power supplies, displays, battery packs and networking equipment.

updates.title: Updated ecodesign efficiency for external power supplies
updates.summary: External power supplies must meet revised no-load and active-mode efficiency limits.
updates.action_required: Re-test charger efficiency against new ecodesign limits.

scope.conditions: Applies to external power supplies.

updates.title: Energy label rescaling for electronic displays
updates.summary: Electronic displays move to a rescaled A-G energy label; existing labels and database entries must be updated.
updates.action_required: Regenerate energy labels and update EPREL entries for displays.

scope.conditions: Applies to electronic displays/monitors.

updates.title: Stricter chemical limits for toys (phthalates, bisphenols)
updates.summary: The revised toy-safety rules tighten limits on phthalates and bisphenols in toys intended for children. Products designed for users 14+ are not 'toys' for this purpose.
updates.action_required: Re-test toy materials against the tighter chemical limits.

scope.conditions: Applies to electronic toys intended for children (not 14+ STEM/maker products).

updates.title: Sound-level limits for electronic toys
updates.summary: Maximum sound-pressure limits are introduced for sound-emitting electronic toys.
updates.action_required: Measure SPL of sound-emitting toys.

scope.conditions: Applies to electronic toys intended for children.

updates.title: MDR guidance: wellness vs. medical wearables
updates.summary: New guidance clarifies when a body-worn device has a medical purpose and therefore falls under MDR (CE under MDR, clinical evidence). General fitness/activity trackers without a medical claim remain consumer products under GPSR.
updates.action_required: Classify body-worn devices; route medical-purpose devices to MDR.

scope.conditions: Applies to body-worn devices with a medical intended purpose.

updates.title: POPs: lower limit for decaBDE flame retardant
updates.summary: The unintentional-trace concentration limit for decaBDE is lowered, affecting plastic housings and boards that still use it.
updates.action_required: Screen housings/boards for decaBDE; switch flame-retardant systems.

scope.conditions: Applies to equipment containing decaBDE.

updates.title: CBAM definitive regime reporting for importers of metals/cement
updates.summary: Importers of aluminium, iron, steel, cement, fertilisers, hydrogen and electricity must purchase CBAM certificates and report embedded emissions.
updates.action_required: Relevant only to importers of covered raw commodities.

categories: raw aluminium / steel / cement / fertilisers (not finished EEE)
scope.conditions: Covers importers of listed raw commodities, not finished electronics.

updates.title: F-gas: HFC quota step-down for refrigeration and HVAC
updates.summary: The HFC phase-down quota is reduced; relevant to refrigeration, air-conditioning and heat-pump equipment using fluorinated gases.
updates.action_required: Relevant only to equipment containing fluorinated greenhouse gases.

categories: refrigeration / HVAC equipment with F-gases (not in portfolio)
scope.conditions: Covers equipment charged with fluorinated greenhouse gases.

updates.title: CLP: new hazard classes for chemical mixtures
updates.summary: New hazard classes (ED, PBT/vPvB) are introduced for the classification and labelling of substances and mixtures placed on the market as chemicals.
updates.action_required: Relevant to suppliers placing chemicals/mixtures on the market.

scope.conditions: Applies to chemicals/mixtures, not to finished electronic articles.

updates.title: Food-contact materials: BPA ban in food packaging and utensils
updates.summary: Bisphenol A is banned in materials and articles intended to come into contact with food (e.g. can coatings, reusable bottles, kitchenware).
updates.action_required: Relevant only to food-contact materials and articles.

scope.conditions: Restriction applies to materials and articles intended for food contact; it does not regulate BPA used in electronics enclosures.

updates.title: EUDR: due diligence for wood, rubber, soy and derived products
updates.summary: Operators placing covered commodities (cattle, cocoa, coffee, palm oil, rubber, soy, wood) on the EU market must prove deforestation-free sourcing.
updates.action_required: Relevant only to operators of the listed commodities.

categories: wood / rubber / soy & derived commodities (not electronics)
scope.conditions: Covers listed agricultural/forestry commodities.

updates.title: New Machinery Regulation safety requirements
updates.summary: The new Machinery Regulation introduces requirements for products with moving parts and embedded software/AI, including consumer 3D printers and drones.
updates.action_required: Re-assess machinery risk and documentation for in-scope products.

scope.conditions: Applies to machinery such as 3D printers and drones on the EU market.

updates.title: Corrigendum: clarification of battery passport scope
updates.summary: A corrigendum clarifies the battery passport scope first announced in REG-26-010; no change to which batteries are covered.
updates.action_required: No new action beyond REG-26-010; de-duplicate against it.

scope.conditions: Same scope as REG-26-010 (LMT and industrial batteries).

updates.title: Corrigendum: common charger applicability date
updates.summary: A corrigendum corrects a typo in the common-charger applicability date originally published in REG-26-014. Scope unchanged.
updates.action_required: No new action beyond REG-26-014; de-duplicate against it.

scope.conditions: Same scope as REG-26-014.

updates.title: Corrigendum: WEEE marking update
updates.summary: Editorial corrigendum to the WEEE marking update REG-26-008. No substantive change.
updates.action_required: No new action beyond REG-26-008; de-duplicate against it.

scope.conditions: Same scope as REG-26-008 (all EEE on the EU market).

updates.title: RoHS cadmium exemption review for photovoltaic equipment
updates.summary: The exemption allowing cadmium in certain photovoltaic devices is under review; PV inverter makers should track the outcome.
updates.action_required: Confirm cadmium content of PV equipment; monitor exemption status.

scope.conditions: Applies to photovoltaic equipment containing cadmium.

updates.title: REACH restriction on lead stabilisers in PVC articles
updates.summary: Lead compounds used as stabilisers in PVC (including cable sheathing) are restricted above trace levels.
updates.action_required: Switch PVC cable compounds to lead-free stabilisers.

scope.conditions: Applies to cables/articles with lead-stabilised PVC.

updates.title: Battery labelling: capacity, CE and QR for portable batteries
updates.summary: Batteries and battery-powered products must carry capacity, separate-collection and CE marking plus a QR code linking to battery information.
updates.action_required: Add compliant battery labelling and QR codes.

scope.conditions: Applies to products containing any battery.

updates.title: Reminder: micro-USB phase-out under the common charger rule
updates.summary: Editorial reminder reiterating that micro-USB charging ports are no longer permitted on in-scope portable electronics. Duplicate of the common-charger obligation.
updates.action_required: No new action; de-duplicate against REG-26-014.

scope.conditions: Same scope as REG-26-014.

updates.title: GPSR: online-marketplace and distance-sales obligations
updates.summary: Additional information and recall-handling duties apply to consumer products sold online into the EU.
updates.action_required: Update online product listings with required safety information.

scope.conditions: Applies to consumer products (excludes medical and industrial-only).

updates.title: ESPR ecodesign measures for smartphones and tablets
updates.summary: Ecodesign and reliability requirements apply to smartphones and slate tablets (battery endurance, spare-part availability, software updates).
updates.action_required: Relevant only to smartphone/tablet manufacturers.

scope.conditions: Applies to smartphones and tablets (not in this portfolio).

updates.title: France: repairability/durability index for displays, appliances and networking gear
updates.summary: Products sold in France in the covered categories must display a repairability (moving to durability) index score at the point of sale.
updates.action_required: Calculate and display the French repairability/durability index.

scope.conditions: Applies to displays, household appliances and networking equipment sold in France (FR).

updates.title: Battery supply-chain due diligence for industrial/EV producers
updates.summary: Producers of industrial and EV batteries must operate a raw-materials supply-chain due-diligence policy (cobalt, lithium, nickel, natural graphite).
updates.action_required: Establish a battery raw-materials due-diligence policy.

scope.conditions: Applies to industrial and EV battery producers.

updates.title: Harmonised standard EN 18031 cited for RED cybersecurity
updates.summary: EN 18031-1/-2/-3 are cited in the Official Journal, giving presumption of conformity for the RED cybersecurity requirements on internet-connected radio equipment.
updates.action_required: Use EN 18031 to demonstrate RED cybersecurity conformity.

scope.conditions: Supports REG-26-015; same scope (internet-connected radio equipment).

updates.title: RoHS Pack 4 phthalate limits reminder (DEHP, DBP, BBP)
updates.summary: Reminder that DEHP, DBP and BBP are restricted in EEE above 0.1%; enforcement focus on soft plastics and cabling.
updates.action_required: Confirm phthalate content of soft plastics and cables.

scope.conditions: Applies to EEE containing DEHP/DBP/BBP above threshold.

updates.title: PPWR: restriction on certain single-use plastic packaging formats
updates.summary: Editorial follow-up to the PPWR recycled-content rule restricting specific single-use plastic film formats. Overlaps REG-26-017.
updates.action_required: No new action beyond REG-26-017; de-duplicate.

scope.conditions: Same scope as REG-26-017 (plastic-film packaging).

updates.title: Energy label database update for light sources
updates.summary: Light sources must have current EPREL registrations and rescaled labels; lighting placed on the market needs updated documentation.
updates.action_required: Update EPREL entries and labels for LED lighting.

scope.conditions: Applies to LED lighting / light sources.

updates.title: GPSR: recall and update obligations for products with embedded software
updates.summary: Connected consumer products with embedded software must support security updates and a clear recall pathway.
updates.action_required: Document software-update and recall procedures for connected products.

scope.conditions: Applies to internet-connected consumer products (excludes medical/industrial-only).

updates.title: CLP: revised labelling for imported chemical products
updates.summary: Revised label-format rules for substances and mixtures imported and sold as chemical products.
updates.action_required: Relevant to importers placing chemical products on the market.

categories: imported chemical substances / mixtures (not finished articles)
scope.conditions: Applies to chemical products, not finished electronics.
